objective: Adopt pinned GSD Pi 1.11.0 behind a standalone, governed Go Shepherd without linking it into the Polymetrics CLI binary.
scope: Pinned GSD Pi runtime admission and supervised headless execution
Issue-bound controller state, leases, human decisions, exact-head evidence, and telemetry
Merge-disabled canary and post-approval legacy cleanup inventory
non_goals: Removing legacy controllers before the replacement canary passes
acceptance_criteria: Every silent live interval emits a heartbeat within 15 seconds
Human gates cannot be defaulted or auto-approved
Concurrent controllers for issue 372 are fenced
The nested Go module passes tests, race tests, vet, and root-module isolation
The final parent PR remains human-gated

tdd.red: Add a failing executable guard before each behavior change.
tdd.green: Implement the smallest fail-closed behavior that passes the guard.
tdd.refactor: Remove duplicated state and keep GSD workflow ownership separate from Shepherd governance.

safety: Never print or persist secrets, prompts, reasoning, command arguments, or tool output
External effects remain disabled until exact-head ratification and canary approval
review_route: Local exact-head validator, then human-gated parent PR
